title: 2:14am checkout outage with possible database split-brain cascade
initial_stakes: Checkout error rates exceed 40 percent, order writes are inconsistent, and the synthetic retail contract is in a critical revenue window.

options.label: Freeze writes and assemble incident command
options.description: Pause risky write paths, confirm database leader state, and start stakeholder updates.

options.label: Restart checkout workers only
options.description: Recycle checkout workers before checking downstream consistency.

options.label: Fail over database immediately
options.description: Trigger database failover without validating replication or write ownership.

title: Identity token anomaly during partner login
initial_stakes: Synthetic partner login traffic shows token replay indicators and compliance reporting may be required.

options.label: Contain suspicious sessions
options.description: Revoke affected tokens, preserve evidence, and open a security incident channel.

options.label: Wait for more alerts
options.description: Delay containment until more failed logins appear.

title: Analytics data pipeline freshness breach
initial_stakes: Synthetic executive dashboards are four hours stale before a contract review.

options.label: Run recovery plan
options.description: Validate source offsets, replay the failed partition, and communicate dashboard confidence.

options.label: Backfill all tables
options.description: Start a full backfill without isolating the failed partition.

title: Deployment pipeline introduces checkout regression
initial_stakes: A synthetic release increases checkout latency after a partial deployment.

options.label: Rollback and preserve diagnostics
options.description: Stop rollout, rollback the release, and capture deployment evidence for review.

options.label: Continue deployment
options.description: Complete the rollout to reduce version skew before checking user impact.

title: Cloud capacity review before synthetic seasonal launch
initial_stakes: Synthetic forecast traffic is 3x baseline and the checkout contract has a critical launch window.

options.label: Model dependency capacity
options.description: Validate downstream scaling limits, identity throughput, and rollback guardrails.

options.label: Scale checkout only
options.description: Increase checkout instances without checking downstream services.
